rule_description: Evaluation and management visit codes are limited to one unit per date of service in this prototype.
Chest X-ray two views is limited to one unit per date of service in this prototype.
Complete ECG is limited to one unit per date of service in this prototype.
ECG tracing only is limited to one unit per date of service in this prototype.
Venipuncture is limited to one unit per date of service in this prototype.
CT head without contrast is limited to one unit per date of service in this prototype.
Complete abdominal ultrasound is limited to one unit per date of service in this prototype.
